repo_prior_art.cite: eid_dml_orthogonality_frontier_v1 Theorem 1: exact local AIPW representation and Riesz norm identity is the closest in-catalogue AIPW/Riesz identity; the present theorem is a normalized point-local CATE specialization.

published_prior_art.cite: ChernozhukovEtAl2018DML gives cross-fitting and Neyman-orthogonal product-remainder logic; Kennedy2023DRCATE gives the DR-CATE pseudo-outcome and generic model-free error-bound skeleton.

repo_prior_art.cite: No consulted in-catalogue Stat entry states the fixed-x0 SA-CATE upper rate b_n+(np_n)^-1/2+sqrt(r_g,n r_m,n); eid_dml_orthogonality_frontier_v1 targets shrinking HTE report/Riesz frontier inference instead.

published_prior_art.cite: Kennedy2023DRCATE gives a generic model-free DR CATE upper decomposition and local polynomial double-residual estimator; KennedyBalakrishnanRobinsWasserman2024MinimaxCATE gives Holder-smooth pointwise CATE rates; the exact black-box localized rate package is not stated there.

repo_prior_art.cite: eid_dml_orthogonality_frontier_v1 asks for primitive DML/Riesz frontier channels, not this three-channel pointwise CATE Le Cam converse with b_n, p_n, and sqrt(r_g,n r_m,n).

published_prior_art.cite: JinSyrgkanis2025GeneralLinearFunctionalLowerBounds gives general structure-agnostic lower-bound technology and KennedyBalakrishnanRobinsWasserman2024MinimaxCATE gives Holder CATE lower-bound geometry, but neither states this localized black-box pointwise CATE converse.

soundness_flags.label: Locked target / Conjectures 1-2
soundness_flags.one_line: The at-a-point target tau_P(x0)=E[Y(1)-Y(0)|X=x0] is not a well-defined functional of the observed law without an explicit version or regularity condition; the local-bias bound presupposes the point value and does not cure this.

accepted_scope_caveats.label: Conjecture 2 / Assumption local-rich
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: Assumption local-rich supplies perturbability for the local Le Cam channels rather than deriving those neighborhoods from primitive distributional geometry.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: The lower-bound claim is accepted only as a conditional field-tier converse under the stated local-richness regime, not as a universal black-box packing theorem.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Restate the target as the smoothed functional theta_h(P), or add an explicit version/regularity condition such as continuity or a Lebesgue-point condition at x0 and then re-check that the proposal is not merely the Holder-smooth Kennedy et al. setting.

State the lower-bound experiment more explicitly: define whether the converse ranges over arbitrary estimators in a statistical model or over black-box-oracle estimators with primitive nuisance-rate information.

Add section- or theorem-level anchors for Kennedy2023DRCATE, KennedyBalakrishnanRobinsWasserman2024MinimaxCATE, and JinSyrgkanis2025GeneralLinearFunctionalLowerBounds so the precise published gap can be audited without relying on abstract-level descriptions.
Add a finite-support or one-dimensional worked Le Cam pair for the nuisance-product channel to make Assumption local-rich less promissory before Stage 0.

recommended_next_step: Continue revise on this angle; fix the fixed-x0 law-functional problem before advancing to Stage 0.
